info.name: Local large language model
info.description:
**Requires [`AppAPI`](https://github.com/nextcloud/app_api) to work.**
See [the nextcloud admin docs](https://docs.nextcloud.com/server/latest/admin_manual/ai/index.html) for more information.
info.author: Marcel Klehr
Alexander Piskun

variable.name: TASK_POLLING_INTERVAL
variable.description: The interval in which the app will poll for new tasks, in seconds (can be floating point numbers). This will only be used when running in Kubernetes or with Nextcloud below v33. This value defaults to 5 seconds.
